title: Peristylus obsoletus

The genus Peristylus is classified under the subfamily Orchidoideae and the tribe Orchideae. Peristylus obsoletus is native to tropical and subtropical regions, including parts of Asia and Australia. The classification of Peristylus obsoletus reflects its evolutionary relationships within the Orchidaceae family.
